title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 30 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/10/2025
The iron ore futures rose con nuously this morning but pulled back slightly in the a ernoon. The most-traded contract I2601 finally closed at 802.5 yuan,up 0.38% from the previous working day. Spot cargo prices at ports were basically flat compared with the previous working day, with PB fines in Shandong transacted at 800-805 yuan, basically unchanged from yesterday's level, and those in Hebei at 810-815 yuan/mt, up 0-5 yuan/mt from yesterday.
